chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5342 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15611/22 2. For hearing of Misc. No.6980/22 3. For hearing of main case. 26.05.2025. Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Israr Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate for Respondent No.2 & 3. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Counsel for SBCA. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG. ------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent. Main grievance of the petitioner is that the Respondent No.3 raising illegal construction on the building known as Panama Centre, Plot No.ST-12/1, ROW-4, Block No.6, Gulshan-e- Iqbal, Karachi. Petitioner is at liberty to file his complaint through digital App of SBCA namely Smart Complaint Redressal of Mechanism where it shall be dealt with in accordance with the SOPs of SBCA. Copy of this order shall be sent to DG, Sindh Building Control Authority for information. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
